findings.message: Possible hardcoded secret or credential found
findings.remediation: Move secrets to environment variables or a managed secrets vault and rotate exposed values.

findings.message: flask 0.12.2 - CVE-2018-1000656: Flask is vulnerable to Denial of Service via incorrect encoding of JSON data
findings.remediation: Upgrade flask to 0.12.3 or later.

findings.message: pyyaml 5.1 - CVE-2019-20477: Deserialization of Untrusted Data in PyYAML
findings.remediation: Upgrade pyyaml to 5.2 or later.

findings.message: TLS/certificate verification appears disabled
findings.remediation: Enable certificate verification; trust only valid CAs.

findings.message: Dangerous dynamic code execution function detected
findings.remediation: Avoid dynamic execution; if unavoidable, strictly validate and constrain inputs.

findings.message: Dangerous dynamic code execution function detected
findings.remediation: Avoid dynamic execution; if unavoidable, strictly validate and constrain inputs.

findings.message: Unsafe deserialization of untrusted data
findings.remediation: Use safe deserialization (e.g. yaml.safe_load, json) and never deserialize untrusted input.

findings.message: Long high-entropy value near a secret-related keyword
findings.remediation: Review whether the value is a credential, token, or key; move real secrets to a vault.

findings.message: Unsafe file access from user-controlled input
findings.remediation: Normalize paths and enforce an allow-listed base directory before file access.

findings.message: Unsafe file access from user-controlled input
findings.remediation: Normalize paths and enforce an allow-listed base directory before file access.

findings.message: SQL query appears built from string concatenation or interpolation
findings.evidence: cursor.execute("SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = " + user_id)
findings.remediation: Use parameterized queries / prepared statements instead of string building.

findings.message: Possible hardcoded secret or credential found
findings.remediation: Move secrets to environment variables or a managed secrets vault and rotate exposed values.

findings.message: lodash 4.17.4 - CVE-2020-28500: Regular Expression Denial of Service (ReDoS) in lodash
findings.remediation: Upgrade lodash to 4.17.21 or later.

findings.message: minimist 1.2.0 - CVE-2020-7598: Prototype Pollution in minimist
findings.remediation: Upgrade minimist to 0.2.1 or later.

findings.message: jquery 3.3.1 - CVE-2019-11358: XSS in jQuery as used in Drupal, Backdrop CMS, and other products
findings.remediation: Upgrade jquery to 3.4.0 or later.

findings.message: requests 2.19.1 - CVE-2024-47081: Requests vulnerable to .netrc credentials leak via malicious URLs
findings.remediation: Upgrade requests to 2.32.4 or later.

findings.message: Sensitive configuration, credential, database, or backup file found
findings.remediation: Keep sensitive files out of source control and public web roots.

findings.message: Sensitive configuration, credential, database, or backup file found
findings.remediation: Keep sensitive files out of source control and public web roots.

findings.message: Broad CORS policy allows requests from any origin
findings.remediation: Restrict CORS origins to an explicit allow-list of trusted domains.

findings.message: Debug or development mode appears enabled
findings.remediation: Disable debug/development mode in production builds.

findings.message: Insecure HTTP URL detected instead of HTTPS
findings.remediation: Use HTTPS for network communication.

findings.message: Weak or broken cryptographic algorithm used in a security context
findings.remediation: Use modern algorithms (SHA-256+, bcrypt/argon2 for passwords, AES-GCM for ciphers).

findings.message: Secret or credential appears to be written to logs/console
findings.remediation: Never log secrets; redact sensitive fields before logging.

findings.message: Security-related TODO, FIXME, or temporary bypass comment found
findings.evidence: - TODO security: review the auth middleware before shipping.
findings.remediation: Resolve security-related temporary comments before release.

findings.message: Security-related TODO, FIXME, or temporary bypass comment found
findings.remediation: Resolve security-related temporary comments before release.

findings.message: Dependency 'certifi' is unpinned; cannot verify against advisories
findings.remediation: Pin an exact version or commit a lockfile so it can be vulnerability-scanned.
